LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE INJUNCTION: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (MOTION FOR INJUNCTION DENIED. ARTICLE III SECTION 32 CALIFORNIA CONSTITUTION STATES "NO LEGAL OR EQUITABLE PROCESS SHALL ISSUE IN ANY COURT AGAINST THIS STATE OR ANY OFFICER THEREOF TO PREVENT OR ENJOIN COLLECTION OF ANY TAX"). (302/AJR/PB) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193
